text: I feel a sense of anticipation and a curious unresolved tension in this environment. The repetition of 'yeah' in the conversation suggests a reluctance, or perhaps an unwillingness to fully engage, while the setting itself—with its glass-walled room and the abstract, explanatory display about research and observation—accentuates a feeling of being on the outside, always about to understand, but never quite inside the heart of the matter. I sense the weight of watching and being watched, and I am strangely aware of the performative nature of observation here. I am both part of the scene and held at a distance by layers of representation and glass.
